summary: Bug fix verification for MINOR-09 (rare tag in prediction result) and Upload Toast notification. Both fixes verified through code review and partial UI testing. Upload toast confirmed working. Rare tag logic in PredictView.js is correctly implemented but could not be fully UI-tested due to training timeout.
critical_code_review_comments: Upload Toast (App.js:1006): VERIFIED - toast.success() correctly shows 'Dataset uploaded successfully — X rows, Y columns' when loading sample datasets
Rare Tag in Dropdown (PredictView.js:64-71): VERIFIED - Dropdown options correctly append '(rare)' tag for categorical values below threshold
Rare Tag in Input Summary Badges (PredictView.js:93-96): VERIFIED - Input badges correctly show '(rare)' tag for rare categorical input values
Rare Tag in Prediction Value (PredictView.js:89-91): VERIFIED - Prediction value shows '(rare)' tag for rare classification predictions
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Insurance Costs sample dataset has columns: Age, BMI, NumChildren, IsSmoker, Region, ExerciseFrequency, ChronicConditions, AnnualIncome, InsuranceCost. Region is the only categorical column with 4 values (northeast, west, midwest, southeast). The rare threshold is max(2, rowCount * 0.02) = max(2, 22) = 22 for 1100 rows. To test rare tags, you would need a dataset where some categorical values appear less than 22 times.

MINOR-09.description: Rare tag in Prediction Result panel Input Summary badges
MINOR-09.implementation: const isCat = activeModel?.modelData?.categoricalCols?.includes(k); const rareTag = isCat && isValueRare(k, String(v)) ? ' (rare)' : ''; return <Badge>...{k}: {v}{rareTag}</Badge>
MINOR-09.verification: Code correctly checks if column is categorical and if value frequency is below rareThreshold, then appends ' (rare)' to badge text

Upload_Toast.description: Toast notification when CSV data is uploaded
Upload_Toast.verification: UI test confirmed toast 'Dataset uploaded successfully — 1100 rows, 9 columns' appeared when loading Insurance Costs sample dataset

Dropdown_Rare_Tag.description: Rare tag in Predict form dropdown options
Dropdown_Rare_Tag.verification: Code correctly calculates frequency and appends '(rare)' to dropdown options

Login_Flow.description: App login flow with existing credentials
Login_Flow.verification: Successfully logged in with test credentials

Navigation.description: App navigation between Analysis, Predict, Explainability tabs

testing_limitations: Model training takes 20+ seconds, causing test timeouts before predictions can be made
Could not fully UI-test rare tag in prediction result because training didn't complete in time
The Insurance Costs sample dataset has evenly distributed Region values (northeast, west, midwest, southeast), so no region would be marked as rare

code_verification_details.rare_threshold_calculation: Math.max(2, rowCount * 0.02) - For 1100 rows, threshold is 22
code_verification_details.isValueRare_function: Counts frequency of value in dataProfile.rows and returns true if freq < rareThreshold
code_verification_details.badge_implementation: Badge component correctly includes data-testid='input-badge-{column}' for testing
